# UPDF Family Welfare Portal

> Secure institutional portal for Uganda People's Defence Force (UPDF) families
> to request welfare support, track aid disbursals, and access the user manual.
> Most surfaces require authentication; only the login page and public manual
> are reachable without sign-in.

## Pages

- [Login](/login): Institutional sign-in and family account creation.
- [User Manual](/manual): Step-by-step guide covering authentication, support
  requests, reporting, and security protocols.
